step_rationale: Specific lipid species in calcified atherosclerotic plaque; causal metabolite in coronary atherosclerosis.
mechanism: A specific triacylglycerol species enriched in calcified coronary plaque that contributes to lipid retention and atherogenic progression.

references.title: Lipidomics-based investigation of its impact on the pathogenesis of coronary atherosclerosis: a Mendelian randomization study.
Variability of the Plasma Lipidome and Subclinical Coronary Atherosclerosis.
